use_cases: Inline dropdown selection for compact UI contexts like settings panels or dashboards
Context action menus with click-to-reveal and hold-to-confirm interactions
Favoriting or quick-action toggles in list views and tables
Editable dropdown items with inline text input capabilities
Mobile-friendly action menus with touch-optimized hold interactions
ai_summary: An inline dropdown component featuring click-to-reveal options with hover states and hold-to-confirm progress animation. Supports multiple interactive states including favorite toggling, inline editing, and context actions. Built with Framer Motion for smooth animations, dark mode support via Tailwind dark: classes, and minimalist flat design with neutral color palette. Ideal for compact UI areas in SaaS dashboards and developer tools.
